text: Workers were warm and welcoming. Provided proper care and cheaper alternatives to products.
author: Shop Gloss Co.

text: Mike was very friendly, professional, and genuine. The processed worked and my tattoo is gone. Thank you to Medermis
author: Anuar Valdez

text: This place is a miracle! I have really fair skin and had tattoos with thick black lines and dark pigmented color. I was skeptical of the results because of the color and my skin but the tattoos are completely gone! Mike is great, he is comforting and explains the procedure and aftercare completely. It's a long process but worth the wait and results. Highly recommend!
author: Esther

text:
Mike is amazing!
Beautiful office, easy location to get too, and extremely clean!  Mike explained everything before we started so there was no questions about what to expect. I had an amazing experience and recommend everyone who has a tattoo that needs removing come here!
author: Sarah Esch

text: This place is a hidden Gem for those who are looking to remove some or all of a tattoo!!!💜💜💜 Mike is the best, super knowledgeable and kind. He has had his own tattoos removed as well and tells you what to expect.  I can't iterate enough how ecstatic I am about my results. I had a huge very deep tattoo and I really can't believe with every session I go to how this is even possible. I cant wait to remove the rest. This place for me is a 10/10
author: Monica

text: Have come to Austin location a few times as well and just like in San Antonio, I always leave feeling very pleased with my experience. My results have been fantastic! 10/10 recommend.
author: Sarah

text: This place is a good as it can get for a very uncomfortable experience (lol). Mo is super cool and easy to talk to, sessions don't last long (depending on how big your tat is), and the process is super easy. Plus, there's a discount for some professions :)
author: Isabella

text: Working with Michael over many many sessions was a great experience! He’s very caring, kind and meticulous. I’m very pleased with the excellent results. I can’t say enough good things about MEDermis.
author: Stef
